articles.title: Multi-Resolution Feature Stem for Diabetic Retinopathy lesion segmentation
articles.excerpt: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of preventable blindness worldwide, requiring automated lesion segmentation using deep learning models for early detection and monitoring. However, DR lesions vary dramatically in size from tiny microaneurysms to large hemorrhages and exudates. This variability creates conflicting demands on the model architecture and input resolution, posing a challenge for effective design. This work investigates the impact of input resolution on different lesion ty
articles.summary: 针对糖尿病视网膜病变病灶尺寸差异大的问题，提出多分辨率特征主干（Multi-Resolution Feature Stem），适应从微动脉瘤到大出血的多种尺度，提升分割精度。

articles.title: PGD-NO: A Neural Operator with Precomputed Geometry Decomposition for 3D Million-scale Physics Simulations
articles.excerpt: While neural PDE solvers have demonstrated significant potential for accelerating engineering simulations, existing architectures remain constrained by high memory consumption and the single node bottleneck, where the maximum processable mesh resolution is strictly limited by the VRAM of a single compute unit. To address these challenges, we propose PGD-NO, a neural operator with Precomputed Geometry Decomposition, that relocates the computational overhead of geometric encoding to a deterministi
articles.summary: 提出PGD-NO神经算子，通过预计算几何分解解决高内存消耗与单节点瓶颈，支持3D百万级物理模拟，突破网格分辨率受单GPU显存限制的问题。

articles.title: Neural Operator-enabled Topology-informed Evolutionary Strategy for PDE-Constrained Optimization
articles.excerpt: The inverse design of physical systems governed by partial differential equations is computationally demanding due to the high dimensionality and non-convexity of design spaces. Generative models for inverse design often lack robustness and transferability, whereas evolutionary strategies are robust but struggle in high-dimensional spaces. This paper introduces a Neural Operator-enabled Topology-informed Evolutionary Strategy (NOTES) that integrates dimensionality reduction, representation learn
articles.summary: 结合神经算子与拓扑信息进化策略，用于PDE约束优化中的逆设计，兼具进化策略的鲁棒性与神经算子的高效性，应对高维非凸设计空间。

articles.title: Physics-Audited Agentic Discovery in Scientific Machine Learning
articles.excerpt: In agentic scientific machine learning (SciML), large language model (LLM) agents can discover surrogate models and select one by an automated score, typically an error metric. A low error, however, does not establish that the predicted fields satisfy the physics that matter for mechanics, such as boundary conditions, superposition, stiffness scaling, or causality. We introduce Physics-Audited Agentic SciML (PA-SciML), a verification-first workflow for agentic SciML discovery. The workflow fixes
articles.summary: 提出物理审计智能体发现方法，确保LLM代理选择的替代模型不仅误差低，还满足力学平衡等物理约束，提升科学机器学习中模型的可信度。

articles.title: RhyMix: A Lightweight Adaptive Multi-Rhythm Network for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
articles.excerpt: Real-world time series exhibit complex dynamics characterized by multiple simultaneous temporal patterns: short-term fluctuations, periodic seasonal cycles, long-term trends, and irregular abrupt changes. articles.title: FourierQK: Spectral Preprocessing of Query-Key Projections Improves Transformer Attention
